name: Procedure: SCP-173 Observation Rota
objective: Design a fail-safe line-of-sight rotation eliminating simultaneous blinking.

name: Procedure: SCP-106 Recall Protocol
objective: Refine femur-breaker recall and EM-field re-containment sequence.

name: Procedure: SCP-939 Cold Habitat
objective: Establish sub-zero feeding and handling protocol for SCP-939.
description: Reduces SCP-939 activity and breach risk.

name: Procedure: SCP-096 Visual Blackout
objective: Implement site-wide image scrubbing to prevent face exposure.

name: Procedure: SCP-682 Acid Submersion
objective: Optimise hydrochloric submersion and adaptation monitoring.

name: Procedure: SCP-035 Secretion Drainage
objective: Automate corrosive secretion drainage and no-contact handling.

name: Procedure: SCP-16829 Temporal Loop Stabilization
objective: Develop reality-anchored stabilisation preventing dimensional egress and temporal looping (Dimension Chemosic).
description: Stabilises SCP-16829 and shields personnel from temporal/carcinogenic exposure.

name: Procedure: SCP-1025 Remote Reading Protocol
objective: Formalise remote-only reading access so no researcher makes direct physical contact.
description: Prevents accidental disease manifestation from direct SCP-1025 reading.

name: Procedure: SCP-2000 Activation Authorisation
objective: Codify multi-signature activation codes and standby power rotation for the contingency machine.
description: Prevents unauthorised activation or dormant-state drift of SCP-2000.
